applets.name: DC Layer Lab
applets.description: Interactive Washington D.C. map with togglable layers, historical data, and AI-driven custom layer generation.

applets.name: Gemini Chat Studio
applets.description: A high-performance, real-time AI chat application powered by Google's Gemini models, featuring a clean and responsive interface.

applets.description: An interactive world history timeline where you can compare different eras, add your own events, and use Gemini to expand historical records.

applets.name: Firestore Admin Panel
applets.description: A CRUD workbench for Firestore using react-admin and react-admin-firebase.
